flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Las Vegas College fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (632 → 536).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Las Vegas College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.7k → $17.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Las Vegas College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.7k → $17.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Las Vegas College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).
